PHP Developer in Göttingen — Who I Am & What I Build

PHP Laravel Freelance Göttingen DACH

If you've landed here searching for a PHP developer in Göttingen or a Laravel freelancer in Lower Saxony, you've found the right place. I'm Hennadii Shvedko, and I've been building web applications professionally since 2017 — most of that time in Göttingen.

What I Build

My core work is backend-heavy web development with PHP. Most projects involve:

  • Laravel applications — custom web apps, SaaS platforms, internal tools, CMS solutions
  • REST APIs — designing and building API layers that connect frontends to business logic
  • Full-stack builds — Laravel backend with React, Vue.js, or Livewire frontend
  • Legacy modernisation — taking old PHP codebases and migrating them to modern Laravel
  • Symfony projects — for clients with existing Symfony codebases

Who I Work With

Most of my clients are DACH-based — German, Austrian, and Swiss businesses that need a reliable development partner who understands local business context and communicates in German or English equally well. I also work remotely with international clients, particularly for larger platform projects.

Industries I've worked in: insurance (enterprise systems), education (digital library platforms), e-commerce (custom CMS), and SaaS (Craftly — my own product).

Why Göttingen?

Göttingen is a university city with a serious tech culture. The Georg-August-Universität brings constant talent, and the presence of research institutions and Mittelstand companies creates a steady demand for good software. It's a reasonable drive from Hannover, Frankfurt, and Hamburg — making it a practical base for on-site work when clients need it.

I've been based here since joining Copernicus GmbH in 2017 and haven't found a reason to leave. The work is good, the city is livable, and the fibre internet is fast.

Open to Work

I'm currently available for:

  • Senior PHP / Laravel Developer roles (on-site or remote)
  • Full-Stack Engineering engagements
  • Architectural consulting for PHP projects
  • MVP builds for DACH startups

If you're looking for a developer with a long track record in PHP, strong Laravel skills, and the ability to take a project from architecture to deployment — get in touch.

Written by Hennadii Shvedko, Founder at ShvedkoDev · Get in touch
